name: primary_key
description: Source-side stable per-row identifier. Optional; the eddy pipeline only uses biomet for the (Rg, P_RAIN, rH) join keys and never propagates this column.

name: timestamp
description: Half-hour observation timestamp in UTC. miaproc.eddy.bigquery_runner filters server-side and ORDER BYs on this; load_stage1 builds the join key DateTime from it.

name: site_id
description: Site identifier (for example RBRL, RBMNN). The grouped BigQuery CLI partitions the flux-side all-data read by --group-column site_id; biomet rows are joined by timestamp after the selected biomet variables are normalized.

name: SWIN_1_1_1
description: Incoming shortwave radiation in W/m^2. Renamed to Rg inside miaproc.eddy by BIOMET_OUT_RENAME. Load-bearing for MDS gap filling, partitioning, and the swthr daytime/nighttime split.

name: P_RAIN_1_1_1
description: Half-hour precipitation in mm. Renamed to P_RAIN. Used by apply_rain_filter to mask flux rows during rain events (drop_rain_rows=False in the BigQuery path; rows are masked, not dropped).

name: RH_1_1_1
description: Relative humidity in percent. Renamed to rH. If a divergent duplicate humidity column reaches the silver stage payload, the M28 collision policy preserves source rH and renames the derived duplicate to rH_norm_s.
